race.comment: PEACE AT LAST (7) hasn't been far away in her two runs to date, the latest an eye-catching fourth over 1200m at this circuit. By Dundeel so any step up in trip at this point will help her cause. MISTER MARTINI (3) wound up late to grab third, beaten less than a length by RACH, when resuming over 1250m at Canterbury recently. Gets a soft run from gate one and over more ground is going to prove tough to hold out. FEAZABEEL (2) was slowly away but still a little disappointing as favourite over 1500m at Goulburn last start. Placed in town over this trip when fresh from a spell the run prior. Worth another chance. The blinkers come off SUN TO ME (6) who is one for the exotics on the back of some steady recent form. THE BIG BLUE (1) is back from an 18-week spell. Placed at his last six runs which makes him difficult to overlook.
